title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 14: The Three Gunas
description: Chapter 14 of the Bhagavad Gita: All of nature consists of three qualities: sattva (goodness), rajas (passion), tamas (ignorance).
introduction: Chapter 14 of the Bhagavad Gita: All of nature consists of three qualities: sattva (goodness), rajas (passion), tamas (ignorance).

translation.text: Sattva binds through attachment to happiness and knowledge. Rajas binds through attachment to action. Tamas binds through negligence and sleep.
